race.comment: INTO BROOKLYN (10) consistent filly due for a change of luck. Comes here in peak condition after sticking on gamely to run second over 1200m at Beaumont (Newcastle). Finds her race with the fitness edge. TRIPLE YES (11) has strengthened over the break and ready to win. On the quick back-up after she was a month between runs with a tough third over 1100m at Hawkesbury in this class. Gets the gun run and shapes as the main danger. BIVACCO (5) will appreciate the firmer surface and drop in weight after disappointing when fourth over 1100m at Goulburn. Likely to go back from the draw and close late. PLAY MY SONG (8) will find this more to her liking with the 3kg claim. Faded late when eighth 1000m at Muswellbrook in BM92 class. Finds a suitable assignment and stays in the mix.
